cols.name: settlement_id
cols.formula: amz.settlement_id | tt.statement_id | shopee: NULL | q10: NULL

cols.name: tax_withheld
cols.formula: amz.tax_withheld | tt.tax_withheld | shopee: NULL | q10: NULL

cols.name: c_cogs_value_total
cols.formula: amz.c_cogs_total_value | tt.c_cogs_value_total | shopee.cogs_total_krw | q10: fn_q10_cogs() × qty

cols.name: o_payment_amount
cols.formula: amz: revenue + tax_collected + shipping + promotion | tt.o_payment_amount | shopee.payment_amount | q10: SUM(total) by pack_no

cols.name: fee
cols.formula: (t.commission_fee + t.service_fee + t.seller_transaction_fee + t.order_ams_commission_fee + t.campaign_fee + t.seller_order_processing_fee + t.final_product_protection + t.bcrs_deposit + t.ads_escrow_top_up_fee) × ratio

cols.name: other
cols.formula: (t.total_adjustment_amount + t.seller_lost_compensation + t.seller_coin_cash_back + t.drc_adjustable_refund + t.sip_subsidy + t.credit_card_promotion - t.reverse_shipping_fee - t.overseas_return_service_fee + t.final_return_to_seller_shipping_fee) × ratio

cols.name: item_calc_settlement
cols.formula: revenue - promotion + shipping - fee - fbs - tax + other
